<file name="f:\AUDIRA-Cloud-Device-Orchestrator\apps\desktop\src\App.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import { QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query';
import { Toaster } from 'react-hot-toast';
import { queryClient } from './lib/queryClient';
import { useAuthStore } from './stores/authStore';
import { useRealtime } from './hooks/useRealtime';
import { useOnlineStatus } from './hooks/useOnlineStatus';
import { ErrorBoundary } from './components/ErrorBoundary';
import { SplashScreen } from './components/SplashScreen';
import { Login } from './views/Login';
import { AppShell } from './components/AppShell';

// Views
import { DashboardPage } from './views/DashboardPage';
import { DevicesPage } from './views/DevicesPage';
import { AlertsPage } from './views/AlertsPage';
import { AIAssistantPage } from './views/AIAssistantPage';
import { MapView } from './views/MapView';
import { Topology } from './views/Topology';
import { Groups } from './views/Groups';
import { Automation } from './views/Automation';
import { Templates } from './views/Templates';
import { Policies } from './views/Policies';
import { RemoteControl } from './views/RemoteControl';
import { Terminal } from './views/Terminal';
import { FileManager } from './views/FileManager';
import { TaskManager } from './views/TaskManager';
import { Jobs } from './views/Jobs';
import { JobsPage } from './views/JobsPage';
import { Schedules } from './views/Schedules';
import { Monitoring } from './views/Monitoring';
import { Logs } from './views/Logs';
import { Reports } from './views/Reports';
import { AIInsights } from './views/AIInsights';
import { Tenants } from './views/Tenants';
import { Users } from './views/Users';
import { RolesPermissions } from './views/RolesPermissions';
import { AuditLogs } from './views/AuditLogs';
import { AuditLogsPage } from './views/AuditLogsPage';
import { AdminPanel } from './views/AdminPanel';
import { Settings } from './views/Settings';

function ProtectedRoutes() {
  const { isAuthenticated, checkAuth } = useAuthStore();
  const { connected } = useRealtime();
  useOnlineStatus();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();

  useEffect(() => { checkAuth(); }, [checkAuth]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isAuthenticated && location.pathname !== '/login') {
      navigate('/login');
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated, location.pathname, navigate]);

  if (!isAuthenticated) return <Navigate to="/login" />;

  return (
    <AppShell>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<DashboardPage />} />
        <Route path="/dashboard" element={<DashboardPage />} />
        <Route path="/devices" element={<DevicesPage />} />
        <Route path="/map-view" element={<MapView />} />
        <Route path="/topology" element={<Topology />} />
        <Route path="/groups" element={<Groups />} />
        <Route path="/automation" element={<Automation />} />
        <Route path="/templates" element={<Templates />} />
        <Route path="/policies" element={<Policies />} />
        <Route path="/remote-control" element={<RemoteControl />} />
        <Route path="/terminal" element={<Terminal />} />
        <Route path="/file-manager" element={<FileManager />} />
        <Route path="/task-manager" element={<TaskManager />} />
        <Route path="/jobs" element={<JobsPage />} />
        <Route path="/schedules" element={<Schedules />} />
        <Route path="/monitoring" element={<Monitoring />} />
        <Route path="/logs" element={<Logs />} />
        <Route path="/alerts" element={<AlertsPage />} />
        <Route path="/reports" element={<Reports />} />
        <Route path="/ai-insights" element={<AIAssistantPage />} />
        <Route path="/tenants" element={<Tenants />} />
        <Route path="/users" element={<Users />} />
        <Route path="/roles" element={<RolesPermissions />} />
        <Route path="/audit-logs" element={<AuditLogsPage />} />
        <Route path="/admin" element={<AdminPanel />} />
        <Route path="/settings" element={<Settings />} />
        <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/dashboard" />} />
      </Routes>
    </AppShell>
  );
}

export function App() {
  const [showSplash, setShowSplash] = useState(true);

  if (showSplash) {
    return <SplashScreen onFinish={() => setShowSplash(false)} />;
  }

  return (
    <ErrorBoundary>
      <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
        <BrowserRouter>
          <Toaster position="top-right" toastOptions={{ duration: 3000 }} />
          <Routes>
            <Route path="/login" element={<Login />} />
            <Route path="/*" element={<ProtectedRoutes />} />
          </Routes>
        </BrowserRouter>
      </QueryClientProvider>
    </ErrorBoundary>
  );
}

</content>
</file>

## 📋 Implementation Checklist

### For Each View Page:

```typescript
// Template for each view page
export function PageName() {
  // 1. State management
  const [data, setData] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  
  // 2. Data fetching
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData();
  }, []);
  
  // 3. Real-time updates
  useEffect(() => {
    const unsubscribe = socket.on('event', handleUpdate);
    return () => unsubscribe();
  }, []);
  
  // 4. Render
  return (
    <PageLayout title="Page Title">
      {loading && <LoadingState />}
      {error && <ErrorState error={error} />}
      {data.length === 0 && <EmptyState />}
      {/* Content */}
    </PageLayout>
  );
}
```
